Beginning at a railroad spike in the centerline of County Road 800 North; thence N 89°50'15" E, 412.85 feet; thence S 00°09'45" E, 330.00 feet; thence S 89°50'15" W, 100.00 feet; thence S 00°09'45" E, 200.00 feet; thence S 45°00'00" E, 141.42 feet; thence S 89°50'15" W, 200.00 feet; thence N 45°00'00" W, 141.42 feet; thence S 89°50'15" W, 100.00 feet; thence N 00°09'45" W, 200.00 feet; thence S 89°50'15" W, 100.00 feet; thence N 00°09'45" W, 330.00 feet; thence N 45°00'00" E, 35.36 feet; thence N 89°50'15" E, 25.00 feet; thence N 00°09'45" W, 50.00 feet; thence N 89°50'15" E, 50.00 feet to the point of beginning.
